popularStory.headline: Agnès d'Antioche
popularStory.description:
Agnès de Châtillon ou Agnès d'Antioche, née vers 1154 et morte en 1184, est une reine de Hongrie, épouse du roi Béla III.

Elle est la fille de Renaud de Châtillon, prince d'Antioche par son premier m …

sourceList.title: Agnes of Austria, „Find A Grave Index“
Foundatio for Medieval Genealogy - AGNÈS de Châtillon (1154-1184, bur Székesfehérvár, transferred to Coronation Church Budapest).

Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - AGNES de Châtillon-sur-Loing, daughter of RENAUD de Châtillon-sur-Loing & his first wife Constance Pss of Antioch (1154-1184, bur Székesfehérvár, transferred to Coronation Church Budapest).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes of Antioch於1154年出生在法國瑟-吉瓦維薩也斯時，她的父親Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antioche29歲，母親Constança da Antioquia27歲。她於1170年與Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar király結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1184年在匈牙利費也艾爾澤可斯費賀瓦享年30歲，埋葬在巴西。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes of Antioch于1154年出生在法国瑟-吉瓦維薩也斯时，她的父亲Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antioche29岁，母亲Constança da Antioquia27岁。她于1170年与Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar király结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1184年在匈牙利費也艾爾澤可斯費賀瓦享年30岁，埋葬在巴西。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes of Antioch was born in 1154, in Versailles, Seine-et-Oise, France, her father, Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antioche, was 29 and her mother, Constança da Antioquia, was 27. She married Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar király in 1170. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1184, in Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungary, at the age of 30, and was buried in Brazil.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes of Antioch est née en 1154, à Versailles, Seine-et-Oise, France, son père, Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antioche, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Constança da Antioquia, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar király en 1170. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1184, à Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hongrie, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterrée à Brésil.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes of Antioch 1154 in Versailles, Seine-et-Oise, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antioche 29 und ihre Mutter Constança da Antioquia 27. Sie hat 1170 Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar király geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1184 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Stuhlweißenburg, Stuhlweißenburg, Ungarn und wurde in Brasilien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes of Antioch è nata il nel 1154 nel Versailles, Seine-et-Oise, Francia, sua padre, Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antioche, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Constança da Antioquia, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar király nel 1170. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1184, nel Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Ungheria, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolta a Brasile.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes of Antiochが1154年にフランスセアイネ-エト-オイゼバーサイレスで生まれた時，父Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antiocheは29歳，母Constança da Antioquiaは27歳であった。1170年にÁrpád-házi Béla III. Magyar királyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1184年にハンガリーフエジeルスズeケスフエheルvaルで30歳で死去し，ブラジルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes of Antioch(이)가 1154년 프랑스 세이인-트-이스 베르세이레스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antioche(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Constança da Antioquia(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1170년 Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar király(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1184년 헝가리 프제이e르 스즈e케스프he르브a르에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 브라질에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes of Antioch nasceu em 1154, em Versailles, Seine-et-Oise, França, seu pai, Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antioche, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Constança da Antioquia, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar király em 1170. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1184, em Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungria, com 30 anos, e foi sepultada em Brasil.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes of Antioch родилась в 1154 г. в местности вирсеиллесь, сине-ет-оис, Франция, её отцу по имени Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antioche было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Constança da Antioquia, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar király в 1170 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1184 г. в местности сзeкесфэeрвaр, феджeр, Венгрия в возрасте 30 лет и была похоронена в местности Бразилия.

es.ABT 1152/1153: desde 8 de enero de 1152 hasta 7 de enero de 1154
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes of Antioch nació en 1154, en Versailles, Seine-et-Oise, Francia, su papá, Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antioche, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Constança da Antioquia, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar király en 1170. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1184, en Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungría, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultada en Brasil.
